recommendations.title: The Little World of Don Camillo
recommendations.overview: In a village of the Po valley where the earth is hard and life miserly, the priest and the communist mayor are always fighting to be the head of the community. If in secret, they admired and liked each other, politics still divided them as it is divi

recommendations.title: Don Camillo in Moscow
recommendations.overview: Priest Don Camillo blackmails his friendly rival Peppone into letting him join a Communist delegation visiting the Soviet Union.

recommendations.title: Irresistible
recommendations.overview: A Democratic political consultant helps a retired Marine colonel run for mayor in a small, conservative Wisconsin town.

recommendations.title: The Mass Is Ended
recommendations.overview: The young priest Father Giulio returns to Rome, his hometown, after a long pilgrimage. Don Giulio hopes to live peacefully with his family and his friends, but discovers that many of them are depressed or frustrated, and some suicidal.

recommendations.title: Detective Chinatown
recommendations.overview: After being rejected from the police college, a mannerly man travels to Bangkok where he and an energetic distant relative must solve a murder case.

recommendations.title: Palombella rossa
recommendations.overview: Michele is a Communist MP who loses his memory in a car crash—although nobody seems to notice. Over the course of a water polo match ahead of election day, he begins to remember his past life, revealing the picture of a man whose personal and politic

recommendations.title: The Kangaroo Chronicles
recommendations.overview: A communist kangaroo moves in with an artist in Berlin.

recommendations.title: Don Camillo's Last Round
recommendations.overview: Bewildered, Don Camillo learns that Peppone intends to stand for parliament. Determined to thwart his ambitions, the good priest, ignoring the recommendations of the Lord, decides to campaign against him.

recommendations.title: The Duchess
recommendations.overview: A chronicle of the life of 18th century aristocrat Georgiana, Duchess of Devonshire, who was reviled for her extravagant political and personal life.

recommendations.title: God Willing
recommendations.overview: The son of an atheist, authoritarian father, believed to be liberal, wants to become a priest.
